data_coverage_summary: Augmentir publicly describes rich APIs, oData support, standard connectors, asset hierarchy management, workflow building, forms, maintenance notifications, and enterprise integrations for connected-worker operations.
buyer_guidance: Use Augmentir integrations for connected-worker instructions, forms, maintenance and asset workflows, training, and enterprise data exchange. This is not a telemetry platform, but it does support asset-oriented workflow data and writeback.
overview: Augmentir's public product pages describe an AI-native connected worker platform with no-code workflow building, smart forms, issue management, asset hierarchy management, and extensibility through rich APIs, oData, pro-code extensibility, and standard enterprise connectors. The public integration content highlights bi-directional integration with ERP, CMMS, QMS, MES, CRM, HCM, and LMS systems, plus asset-centered work and maintenance procedures, skills requirements, collaboration, associated documentation, CIL or standard work schedules, and history of activities on each asset. This is a write-capable manufacturing workflow platform with supported asset-oriented data, but it does not present public telemetry APIs. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: Augmentir publicly documents the workflow and knowledge surfaces it integrates across industrial operations.
data_points: Skills management and targeted training insights
Digital work instructions and step-by-step procedures
Smart forms with validation and workflow branching
Issue management and Kanban-based problem solving

available_data.description: The platform also exposes asset-centered operations and broad system integration paths into the manufacturing digital thread.
data_points: Work and maintenance procedures by asset
Skills, documentation, and collaboration attached to assets
Bi-directional integration with ERP, CMMS, QMS, MES, CRM, HCM, and LMS systems

ingest_considerations: Augmentir's public evidence is strong on workflows and integration capabilities but does not expose endpoint-level schemas, so downstream mappings should remain conservative until richer technical docs are available.
The public site explicitly mentions APIs and oData but not raw telemetry or machine interfaces, so telemetry support should remain Unsupported unless vendor technical docs show otherwise.
No exact public machine-readable spec artifact was confirmed for Augmentir.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Augmentir's public product pages describe rich APIs, oDATA, standard connectors, workflow builder, smart forms, issue management, asset hierarchy management, and bi-directional integration with ERP, CMMS, QMS, MES, CRM, HCM, and LMS systems, along with asset-specific procedures, schedules, and maintenance workflows.
